resources.string: Selects the aspect ratio for still images.
Shoots an image with a width to height ratio of 3:2. Suitable for ordinary prints.
Shoots an image with a width to height ratio of 16:9. Suitable for viewing on a widescreen TV.
Records JPEG images of fine quality.\nRecords beautiful images with little deterioration.
Records JPEG images of standard quality. Allows more images to be stored on a memory card.
Creates a stunning and striking light ray expression by simply setting the position of the light source and effects.
Creates a crepuscular ray effect - emulating rays from the sun. Best for light coming through clouds. Saves the original image and image with the effect applied.
Creates a star-shaped light effect with the light source in the center. Best for emphasizing rays. Saves the original image and image with the effect applied.
Creates a circle-shaped light effect with the light source in the center. Best for expressing soft light. Saves the original image and image with the effect applied.
Creates a light beam effect from the light source. Best for punchy expressions. Saves the original image and image with the effect applied.
Sets the position of the light source.\nYou can also set a light source outside the frame.
Sets the position of the light source.
Adjusts the width of the rays.
Adjusts the direction of the rays.
Adjusts the strength (brightness) of the rays.
Adjusts the strength of the rays.
Adjusts the length of the rays.
Adjusts the strength of the light.
Adjusts the length of the light.
Sets the position of the light source and the direction of the rays.
Sets the position of the light source and the direction of the rays.\nYou can also set a light source outside the frame.
